top_issues.message: Function 'transfer' writes to storage after an external call — reentrancy risk
top_issues.suggestion: Move state updates before the external call, or use a reentrancy guard

top_issues.suggestion: Use a shared reentrancy guard across functions that touch this key

top_issues.suggestion: Use a shared reentrancy guard across functions that touch this key

top_issues.suggestion: Use balance.checked_add(amount) instead of the bare operator

top_issues.suggestion: Use balance.checked_sub(amount) instead of the bare operator
